channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — June 25, 2026
item.description: You will not be able to use very many for any one practice period, because a longer time than usual should be spent with each one. Today’s idea should be applied as follows: First, name the situation: “I am concerned about ______.” Then go over every possible outcome which has occurred to you in that connection and which has caused you concern, referring to each one quite specifically, saying: “I

item.title: Lesson 61: “I am the light of the world.”
item.description: “I am the light of the world.” Who is the light of the world except God’s Son? This, then, is merely a statement of the truth about yourself. It is the opposite of a statement of pride, of arrogance, or of self-deception. It does not describe the self-concept you have made. It does not refer to any of the characteristics with which you have endowed your idols. It refers to you as you were created
